data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for link shortening for booking links, but the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The only evidence provided relates to booking confirmations and customer interactions, which do not address the specific requirement for link shortening. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of link shortening functionality for booking links.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for link shortening
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the link shortening functionality.
